curation_notes: The patch commit updates the vm2 dependency in packages/jsreport-core/package.json from 3.9.11 to 3.9.17, fixing CVE-2023-29017 (a vm2 sandbox escape). No jsreport source files were modified—only package.json, yarn.lock, and a test file. The location is derived from the source file that imports and instantiates vm2 (VM, VMScript): packages/jsreport-core/lib/worker/sandbox/createSandbox.js. The function is null because the vulnerable code path is the module-level default export (an anonymous function). Kept the pre-assigned class command-injection because the sandbox escape allows attacker-controlled template code to execute arbitrary OS commands via child_process.execSync.
